subject: Tinkatuff, a round pink bipedal Pokemon with a bow-like adornment on its head, shown beside a large dark hammer-like mass
description: A round, pink bipedal Pokemon with a small bow atop its head stands in a mid-shot composition against a light, neutral rocky background. To the right and partially behind it looms a very large, dark hammer mass — heavy and rough-textured — that dwarfs the creature's body. The Pokemon's posture is upright and calm, with small rounded limbs. The overall palette is pale pinks, grays, and dark charcoal from the hammer element.
foreground: round pink Pokemon with bow adornment, large dark hammer mass beside it
background: light neutral background with subtle rocky texture
